use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Navigation triggers with ghost and link variants
Destructive action buttons for delete or remove operations
Secondary actions with outline and secondary variants
ai_summary: A reusable React button component with comprehensive variant options (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size configurations (default, small, large, icon). Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management and Radix UI Slot for flexible composition. Includes built-in accessibility features with focus-visible ring states and proper disabled state handling.
